inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the room to be covered with linoleum.

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the room to be covered with linoleum.

inputs.label: Roll Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the linoleum roll as supplied by the manufacturer.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material to account for cutting, pattern matching, and installation waste.

inputs.label: Price per m²
inputs.businessContext: Cost of linoleum per square meter in local currency.

outputs.primary: Total area to purchase: {finalArea} m², Total cost: {totalCost} currency.
